speaker: MATT
raw_text: So you guys have been at sea for a handful of days. It's been relatively uneventful. The boat slowly rocks, as the waters of the Ozmit are much calmer by comparison to that of the Lucidian Ocean. Making them a much more popular trade route pass between the various continents on this side of Exandria. Now the slow rocking of the boat, across the somewhat choppy waters, leads some of you into a relaxing lull over these days. Others, into perpetual bouts of nausea. But you notice that Captain Adella runs a relatively tight ship. Her crew works like clockwork, at her order, and the skies are thankfully clear these first few days, and the journey so far is mild. What would you guys like to-- Is there anything you wish to accomplish as you are travelling across the sea?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It was an audition, it was a brutal audition.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. In which, knowing more about your new companion, you accepted him for the time being, understanding the dangers that are involved in following your path and he accepted. You made your way to Emon, looking as a way to find passage towards Vesrah, the home of the Water Ashari and the hopeful completion of Keyleth's AraMente. Upon finding and hiring a crew under the Captain Adella, you made your way onto your new ship and began to traverse westward onto the Ozmit Sea.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shit, we're on a boat. We're on a boat motherfuckers!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So you guys have been at sea for a handful of days. It's been relatively uneventful. Upon finding and hiring a crew under the Captain Adella, you made your way onto your new ship and began to traverse westward onto the Ozmit Sea.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shit, we're on a boat. We're on a boat motherfuckers!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Perfect. So, as the two tinkering nerds begin to reveal their secret inner interests, Vex, you, about three days into this venture, you catch what looks to be a dark spot right on the horizon. Midday, maybe like two o'clock in the afternoon, it's a warm sun, this far, as you start moving westward and southward, you head closer to what would be the equator of the planet. It's getting warmer, and the sea spray is coming up, the smell of seawater and brine occasionally meets your nose, as the ship hits the various waves as they come across, but you're still keeping a keen eye out. And it's just endless sea in all directions, you see no landmass, but you see a little bit of something appearing at the horizon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, yes. Just hanging out, off and on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I guess I've been trying to get to know Tary a little bit better. And also flying like Vex-Kite behind the ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Lots of push-ups, trying to beef up my pecs. I also, at the start of every day, I'm going to take two of those-- I have a bunch of silver coins that I carry around with me, and I'm gonna cast a couple of spells into them, just to have them at the ready. I cast Fly into one and Blur into the other.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And then I would probably wander down to good old Percy, and just ask him if he needs help with any tinkering.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, no, I wanna see what he has, too. Like, there's gonna be some trading. I'll show stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll show you mine, if you show me yours?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Perfect. So, as the two tinkering nerds begin to reveal their secret inner interests, Vex, you, about three days into this venture, you catch what looks to be a dark spot right on the horizon. Midday, maybe like two o'clock in the afternoon, it's a warm sun, this far, as you start moving westward and southward, you head closer to what would be the equator of the planet. And it's just endless sea in all directions, you see no landmass, but you see a little bit of something appearing at the horizon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, yes. Just hanging out, off and on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I guess I've been trying to get to know Tary a little bit better. And also flying like Vex-Kite behind the ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Lots of push-ups, trying to beef up my pecs. I also, at the start of every day, I'm going to take two of those-- I have a bunch of silver coins that I carry around with me, and I'm gonna cast a couple of spells into them, just to have them at the ready. I cast Fly into one and Blur into the other.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And then I would probably wander down to good old Percy, and just ask him if he needs help with any tinkering.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, no, I wanna see what he has, too. Like, there's gonna be some trading. I'll show stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll show you mine, if you show me yours?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Take the helm." She hands off the wheel to one of her compatriots, and she rummages over in one of the small chests to the side, and pulls out a large scroll and slams it onto a table she keeps maybe ten feet off to the right of her. And she goes through and pulls out a few instruments. Marks the sun and takes a good five minutes or so getting a really strong idea of where the positioning is. She looks down. "No, not much in the way of landmasses out here, my dear."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it could be another ship, possibly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It could be a ship, it could be anything that would be stationary. Literally, it's only because of your keen vantage point, and your honed eyesight, that you're able to even make that slight, little bump in the horizon from here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you fly down, you see her, she's at the front of the ship. She has her one hand currently on the wheel, and she's looking out, chatting to the side with one of her crewmates, and turns around as you fly down next to her. She's surprised at your immediate appearance and she's like, "Oh, (gasps) sorry, I--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You'll get used to that someday.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of these days, I'm sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I see something on the horizon; do you know of any masses in the area? Maybe a ship, or island, or--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Concentration for up to a minute, so okay. So as you focus-- actually, this is not a spell--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth, ask the captain if she wants to have extra speed from your wind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I was-- I'm not talking to you, anymore, Percy. Captain.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you approach from behind, she's currently holding the wheel, and she doesn't even turn her head to you, goes, "Yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Would you like more speed behind those sails?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay! And then I go back and I start doing Gusts into the sails.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, Gust is a what-level spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's a cantrip, or I could do a level three Gust of Wind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Gust would be like a (pfft). It's more of a heavy fart.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, level two Gust of Wind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A level three Gust of Wind, you said?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Level two, level two. Gust of Wind.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The tension on the ship slowly recedes over the next hour as there is no sign of anything else.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I turn to Doty, and I say, take this down. With an efficiency and an effective leadership role model for everyone, the redhead continues to propel us forward, faster and faster, to everyone's surprise and respect, including the captain. As the salt licks my nose, and the sweet smell of adventure is in the air, I know that with her on our side, we will be strong and we will be protected. End of chapter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, look! I've got rubber booties! (laughs)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: (laughs) Yeah, you look down, you don't see anybody in the water, but a moment passes and you glance over and there, up the side of the ship, with two daggers, climbing, and soaking, sopping wet with seawater, which has caused all of the heavy, thick black fabric to just become an additional 40 pounds on him, you watch Vax make his way up to the top of the ship once more.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's one good, one good chest, here. You know what, I will draw you a picture. All right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'm gonna try to climb up without falling into the drink, all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, go ahead and make an athletics check real fast

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is this my character sheet? (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a five? (laughs) You hear this brief bit of tension (sound of exertion). And then a (splash).

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Vax? Vax? Yeah, okay, right, you fell off the ship. Right? Vax? Um?! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think Vax may have fallen overboard.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I know it could be a very elaborate joke, but you know that sound when you deuce, and it goes  (ker-ploop)? (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I just heard that and I think it was Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I look down in the water?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. About two hours later, I'll have you both roll perception checks, if you could.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna land in the crow's nest with Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That was amazing! You are so drenched right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm twice as heavy as normal.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Man. Yeah, no seriously, she's that stunning, huh, in the front?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I can't wait for the picture.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I kinda do a quick, like, Druidcraft gust and dry him off a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. It's like holding a hairdryer to him, just (loud whooshing). (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His lips are like (pbbbft) off to the side briefly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I shake like a husky a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you said you head to the crow's nest with Percy?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Anything in particular, just keeping watch?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Looking out every now and then.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't feel as nauseous up here, it's nice.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "From the recent calculations I made on our map, we're at least a day and a half out."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's communication with flags. It's a primitive communication technique that I learned in many of my studies, boat-to-boat it's really helpful. I pull out a couple of pieces of fabric and start gesturing--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit. You're that guy. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, you just said to announce ourselves, I could announce. Vox--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I wonder if they can see through the fog?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we should have him do that. You should go to the front of the ship--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: -- and just make sure they know we're coming.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can you do any like tosses? Like color guard?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That would be really cool, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, Captain? How close are we to our destination? This could be Vesrah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. Vax, where are you? Since you are hiding.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With Trinket right by your side.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Me and Percy had said we were sort of on our way down.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Or actually, we had sort of headed towards the other boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, so you guys had made your way. So, yeah. So--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was gonna ask you to drop me at the other crow's nest on the other ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You need more iron in my diet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: These are probably the Water Ashari, aren't they?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you guys are heading this way? Are you taking him with you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Uh, I was going to. I wasn't going to go all the way to the other boat, but I can. If you want to go with us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Tor Books, Tor Books, Tor Books. It's actually kinda hard.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He gets blasted. And (Wilhelm scream) just plunges off the side of the chain, loses his footing, tumbles over, and vanishes into the fog. And you hear this splash, a moment later.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's annoying. Okay, I'm gonna use the pepperbox, the Animus, and I'm also going to burn a Grit for a push.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For which one of these guys?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Both of them. I'll start with the first one, and work my way down.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right, so, let's see what happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And that's-- I'm sorry, you know why I'm a little confused, I just had to switch, again. That's, wow--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: -- that's good. That's 17 points of damage and five points of psychic damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And he goes ten feet away from me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As he's trying to step across the chain--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You get the sense, it's gonna take a few rounds, but if you keep at this, you'll probably have a  good chance of achieving your goal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, as you get on the edge you begin to pull your arms up, and as you do, you hands begin to glow with a dull blue-turquoise color, similar to the skin of this fish-like creature, and it glances over at you, and its jaw opens. You can see this burbling sound as the edges of the water begin to rise up and splash and pour into the ship, perpetually filling the lower, usually air-filled section of this ship. And it begins to immediately (thud) list a little bit to one side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I have any movement, or is that it? Probably getting up is my movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's gonna be your action, and climbing up is gonna be your movement. So that's kinda where you are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can maintain concentration on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're gonna want to break the chains.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Ending Keyleth's turn, it is now the crew's go. So the crew here is gonna turn the ballistas around, as the captain leaps off down and goes behind the guy who attacked you, Vax. She pulls out a scimitar, rushes forward screaming, "Yah!" and just does a full downward arc into the back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I have any movement, or is that it? Probably getting up is my movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's gonna be your action, and climbing up is gonna be your movement. So that's kinda where you are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can maintain concentration on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're gonna want to break the chains.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You get the sense, it's gonna take a few rounds, but if you keep at this, you'll probably have a  good chance of achieving your goal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cool. It's what I like to hear in life, in general.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You might bring our ship down with it, Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If you keep at it, you might be able to achieve your goal.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, but, the chains attaching two ships.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: She says as she destroys everything.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It depends, right now it'll be probably two rounds before it begins to genuinely start sinking heavily. Depending on if the ballista get another shot at the side or not.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We've got these shitty nicknames for everyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14, and, okay. Total of 21 points of damage on her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as she tries to parry to the side, the pirate just catches her off-guard and gets three good hits in, but Adella parries off to the side, gets pushed back a bit, and then forces her way forward, preparing her counter-attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We should probably protect the captain.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit. We're still attached to this boat, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Currently, yes. If you're still concentrating on this, the water's still pouring into it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I am. How much slack do we have before I start pulling our boat underwater, because I don't want to be that-- kinda thought someone would start--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. The ship is still sinking. You filled it with water, and currently the side of it has been blasted twice.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I did something bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I say  Hey guys! Cruises are really trashy! (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I still have Control Water going.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I flush out the bottom of the cruise ship and bring whatever treasure is up out of the bow with what water is there? Just kind of (whoof)?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're kinda off to the side. You can look down, it's not very well-lit on the inside at all. Like, it is not lit on the interior. You do have your elven darkvision for a few feet, so you have to glance over and look into the room below, but right now all you're seeing is seafoam and ocean pouring into the side of the ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I stop sinking the boat. Because we're not dying.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: What last murmurs of this man's life that remained as he began to fade to the drowning, you both manage to just bring him back from the cusp of death, and coughing profusely over the next 30 or so seconds, turning onto his stomach and gathering himself, taking breaths, spitting out whatever seawater still remains in his lungs, he looks back up at you all, and you can see he has a ragged, mouse-brown hair on top, and it's shorter on the sides around the ear, rather large ears, kind of square jaw but very scrawny, and once again from the tattered clothes and scars all over his body, some fresh, some old, looks like he's undergone a rough recent weeks--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What is dead may never die!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, you keep scooching back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you get down on the low, and you reach out and grab the shoulder, and using the last moments of your Control Water spell, you focus and begin to just siphon the water out of the lungs, and immediately the body kind of convulses, the throat opens up from the outside, and you can see the water just project outward as the chest pushes inward, expelling the rest of the liquid from the lungs. Immediately, (coughs).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I do pat, pat, pat, except I cast Lay on Hands when I do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, well, I cast Cure Wounds while that happens, so go fuck yourself.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Seems oddly competitive at this moment, where we're saving a man's life, but all right.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Tempest Fang. Yeah. It was taken by a bunch of bastards, kept me in that cage for a few weeks."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I insight check him and make sure? I just don't trust anyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's Hotis, it's Hotis, it's Hotis, it's Hotis!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh it is, it's Hotis, it's Hotis!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I don't wanna fight Hotis on the ocean.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What you got? What do you got, Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Keep tweeting those pick-up lines to @TorBooks. They like 'em. I do, anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Guys, I'm gonna make a Tor Books run, does anybody want anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He leans forward, sits up and looks at you. He seems to soften a little bit, though he's still guarded. "Thenton Groose. First Mate of the ship Tempest Fang. Yeah."

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Yeah, no, we got maybe a day and a half travel 'til we reach the islands, so--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No-- well, sort of-- not really-- sort of. It's complicated. We don't pour acid on people-- well, that's not true. No, that's a lie. We don't just pour acid on people, I feel like that's reasonable to say. We don't just pour acid--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: -- there's usually context involved. Things are complicated.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I am following your lead. But--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: When it is time to pour the acid, we will undoubtedly make sure that you are on the front-- not yet--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: -- just kinda watching this whole thing with her arms crossed. One of her crewmates is currently at the helm.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I mean, the closest place to us right now is our desination, most likely, right? We're not gonna be able to dump this guy before we arrive, do you think?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. So as everything rests down in the ship you can use, you have about a day and a half travel until you're supposed to reach the islands.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So the ship is still progressing in that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I do a nature check on it? On the orb?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To? What do you want to do with the nature check?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: To see if it smells like nature.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did it come from any Water Ashari, or anything like that? (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you my brother? Are you my brother? (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It looks like a magic item.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Does it have smoke inside when you turn it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Like those weird balls filled with weird sand--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, actually, it kinda looks like that. As you shift it, it swirls on the inside. It causes the air-- intense condensation that eventually drips from the outside of it when it's activated.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, they're clustered, you have many people per room. They're like bunks. So yeah, you post outside of the brig. As evening comes, the night passes. Is there anything you want to do? You just rest for the night?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It looks like a magic item.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Does it have smoke inside when you turn it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Like those weird balls filled with weird sand--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, actually, it kinda looks like that. As you shift it, it swirls on the inside. It causes the air-- intense condensation that eventually drips from the outside of it when it's activated.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So as everything rests down in the ship you can use, you have about a day and a half travel until you're supposed to reach the islands.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I post up outside of the brig where stabbed-in-the-body McGee is sleeping?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll forego my room. I just want to sleep sitting up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we have rooms? I thought it was like Amex City on this--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we have rooms. But they're combined.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It was three days before this encounter, you have a day and a half left.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh. I got a 16, but I get plus ten with my tinkerer's tools.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And mine's proficiency bonus and dex bonus on top of that 19? So that's 30.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Between the two of you guys, it is not an issue. Even with your limited materials, but your travel-tinkering capabilities-- you manage to deftly create this seamless, beautiful, you could sell it on the street.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So they can-- we may even make a little headband so they can pop it on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) You guys are so cute. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I spend my evening reconnecting with Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The Hallmark card way of saying fucking.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, there goes our sponsor by Hallmark.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a couple days-- we've been traveling for a while, right?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: -- the evening comes to a close, the next day's journey is met with a coming cloudfront, does not appear to be storm-bearing clouds but the clear skies seem to have come to an end.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure that's how they feel. No one's ever sure they're doing the right thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But I did hear you, sorry to-- I did hear you and sorry that I didn't say.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, it's all right. Takes the pressure off, really, knowing that you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I treasure every minute, and you remind me to not be so serious.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm not saying that you're not serious but-- (sighs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (exasperated voice) You can go play with Tary some more if you like.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm done with Tary for the evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Great! Then you can play with me! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And crossing the whiskey off the inventory.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Mm-hm. As the next day comes to a close, the sun setting, you hear a call from the top of the crow's nest that shouts out, "Land ho!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But I did hear you, sorry to-- I did hear you and sorry that I didn't say.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, it's all right. Takes the pressure off, really, knowing that you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I treasure every minute, and you remind me to not be so serious.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm not saying that you're not serious but-- (sighs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (exasperated voice) You can go play with Tary some more if you like.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm done with Tary for the evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Great! Then you can play with me! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And crossing the whiskey off the inventory.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: -- the evening comes to a close, the next day's journey is met with a coming cloudfront, does not appear to be storm-bearing clouds but the clear skies seem to have come to an end.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm restless in all of my night's sleep as we get closer.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So with that (pffff) the spray of vapor in the air of the night sky, the darkness ahead of you that was currently-- the clouds obscuring any sort of starlight, suddenly is showered with a spray of vibrant colors across the entire spectrum, as the vapor slowly cascades around each side of the ship. As it does, a few moments pass and you watch more lights spark open in the distance (puff puff puff puff puff) whatever the source is, you begin to get a clearer view and there you can just barely begin to see the edges of what appear to be a very, very faint outline of a number of buildings all springing up from the water itself.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, this is fantastic. And I run to the edge of the ship and I shoot a Daylight into the spell and throw a Create Water and make a rainbow over top of us.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, so as you guys begin making your way, roughly five minutes behind you, as you all are kinda moving forward together via carpet, flight, and her swimming, and Grog strongly pushing his way through, Tary's just impatiently waiting for them to get the other boat off the side of the ship and they're slowly lowering it down, kind of the ropes having to adjust as it goes and you're like (groans). (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No! Trinket's gonna be in my necklace.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Trinket goes in the necklace.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so your sister, you guys are taking the carpet--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: -- Grog, you're going in the boat?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: With a robot. Robot in the--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No. Dottie is not coming with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, he can come on the--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, he can't. It's too heavy. It's too heavy for the carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Doty cannot come on the carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's too heavy to go on the carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have to stay behind with Doty.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Get him on a boat. Get on a boat, Tary.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is there another rowboat for us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They have other rowboats on the side, you can request another one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I would like to request another rowboat for Doty.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: And looking out above you, you can see this beautiful lagoon that is completely submerged in about a foot, foot and a half of water for a good mile in all directions. And you can see dozens and dozens of these Grecian looking white and green marble structures that rise up out of the water. You can see a series of poles that stand up holding these lanterns that have all been magically set alight to give the city a sort of a glow. You see shapes moving, you see figures shifting out of these buildings and making their way in your direction, and as you're looking at this space in front of you and you guys begin to kind of meet up, you watch as a figure (whoosh) out of the water next to Keyleth. You glance to your left and look down and you see what appears to be a child, maybe about 13 years old, human-like, though his ears come to a bit of a finned appearance. You can see what looks to be gill slits to the side of the neck, and he looks up at you with kind of a tattered, long-stiffened piece of cloth tunic and shorts that end at the knee,and he kinda looks up at you and just kinda smiles with these very, very bright, orange-ish yellow eyes, "Hi."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so as you guys begin making your way, roughly five minutes behind you, as you all are kinda moving forward together via carpet, flight, and her swimming, and Grog strongly pushing his way through, Tary's just impatiently waiting for them to get the other boat off the side of the ship and they're slowly lowering it down, kind of the ropes having to adjust as it goes and you're like (groans). (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I see adventure over this way! Too bad you won't be there to see it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm missing it, hurry up! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys begin to approach, Keyleth, your feet eventually hit sand as opposed to treading water, and as you begin to walk up, the water comes past your waist, down to eventually your knees, and that is about as low as it goes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As far as it goes, yeah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "We will show you at the Aerie tomorrow in the morning."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Don't kill the kraken. Right? Don't kill the kraken?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Get three lodestones, bring it back, don't kill him because he is responsible for you guys not sinking into the ocean.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. So he drops these lodestones at the base of the water plane.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes. Often found within the vicinity of the rift, but such is the beast. Be quick, be careful, be stealthy, and return as soon as you have them."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you have an example of these lodestones so that we know what we're looking for?
